name: MiSa
short_description: MiSa is a single-player horror adventure game where the player moves through five locations in the mind of the main character Mark. The goal of the game is to find a way from the world of illusions to reality, successfully distinguishing between them.
detailed_description:
MiSa is a thrilling single-player horror adventure game set in a complex and mysterious world created in the mind of the protagonist named Mark. In this game, you go on a fascinating journey through five unique locations, each of which is a separate adventure full of secrets and unexpected turns.

Each location draws you into its web, and you will have to face countless challenges that Mark created inside his mind. Your main goal is to find a way out of this dark and confusing world that he created, back to reality. However, be careful, as every detail of this world can be a trap ready to lead you into madness.

As you play, you will have to explore dark corners and mysterious spaces full of dangers and obstacles that reflect the inner fears and experiences of the protagonist. And only by showing attentiveness and common sense, you will be able to distinguish illusion from reality. Your successful completion of the game will depend on your ability to distinguish between real threats and deceptive images that surround you.

Become part of this exciting story and find out what secrets Mark's mind hides. Will you be able to break free, or will you remain forever locked in his dizzying and crazy world? Bring your skills to the limit and get ready for an exciting challenge.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Ukrainian, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
